_metadata.note_yes_no_classification: Yes/No classification is NOT stored client-side. It is computed SERVER-SIDE via POST /api/yes-no-tarot. The SingleCardUnderstanding component only shows example cards as illustrations.
_metadata.note_three_card_yes_no: Three-card Yes/No uses the standard reading flow with spread id 'yes-no' and sends to POST /api/session then /api/reading/cards-selected

tarotUtils.getFontClass: returns 'font-sans japanese' for ja, 'font-sans chinese' for zh-CN/zh-TW, 'font-sans' for others
tarotUtils.slugify: card nameEn -> lowercase, replace _ with -, replace spaces with -

strongYesCards.meaning: Hope and divine guidance favor you

strongNoCards.meaning: Trapped energy, not the right time

rules.description: The universe strongly supports your path forward
Success is probable, but requires effort and patience
Outcome depends entirely on your actions and choices
Strong universal resistance to your current path

cardNameLocalization._note: Card names are localized via i18n keys in the main bundle
